description_long: This rifle features a streamlined, angular body with a prominent barrel extending from the front, finished in a gradient of dark blue and metallic gray tones. The main receiver is blocky and robust, with a slightly raised section along the top that may house internal mechanisms or a mounting rail. The stock is integrated into the rear of the rifle, forming a continuous line with the body, and appears solid and non-adjustable. The trigger guard and magazine area are subtly defined, with the magazine well blending into the lower receiver. The barrel is cylindrical and extends well beyond the handguard, suggesting a design optimized for accuracy and range. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal, giving the rifle a durable and tactical appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A sleek, angular rifle with a long metallic barrel and integrated stock, finished in dark blue and gray. The design is robust and modern, with a solid, continuous body and minimal external attachments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the long barrel, integrated stock, and angular body.
description_view_1: Front-angled view emphasizing the cylindrical barrel and the compact, blocky receiver, with the stock receding into the background.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the rifle's length, the smooth transition from barrel to stock, and the subtle magazine area.
description_view_3: Rear-angled view focusing on the end of the stock and the alignment of the barrel, with the handguard and trigger area partially visible.
